arts.ttl: Spain captain Alvaro Morata reveals mental health struggles led to Atletico Madrid departure
arts.sum: Alvaro Morata had an eventful summer. In July, he guided Spain to glory at Euro 2024, before leaving Atletico Madrid in favour of a move to AC Milan. Morata has now opened up on the decision behind his Atleti exit.
